pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh, which explicitly constructs the synthetic email in the MBOX file with this subject line, attaching the target PDF.

privileged_info_summary: The environment generates a synthetic ZIP archive at '/home/ga/Downloads/ediscovery_export.zip' containing an MBOX file ('client_archive.mbox'). This MBOX contains a target email with the subject 'Fwd: Executed W-9 Form for Project', which holds a base64-encoded synthetic PDF attachment ('fw9.pdf'). The task evaluates success by checking if this PDF is successfully extracted and saved to the specific path '/home/ga/Documents/Case_Files/fw9.pdf'.
